title: Aviator Dreams
description: An Add-On for Immersive Aircraft mod that contain real life planes from small to big.
body:
![Mod icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b040478b6e268f8284e8ac9851ae4c9a3636b79.png)

What is Aviator Dreams : well it is an Add-On for a mod called Immersive Aircraft which add a variety of aircrafts to the game from small biplane to large airship and Aviator Dreams will add more planes to the said mod.

Theme : Aviator Dreams aimed at adding real life planes to the game and we don't do fantasy stuff as we are not good at it. while current theme was Pioneer which are mostly early propeller aircraft

Aircrafts included (so far) :
-Dehavilland DH-106 Comet 1
-Douglas DC-1
-Douglas DC-2
-Douglas C-47
-Fokker F.VIIA
-Fokker F.VIIB-3M
-Lockheed L-1049G Super Constellation
-Toyota Stout K100 (I guess we truck now)
  
Future plans :

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
-Douglas DC-3
-Douglas DC-4
-Hawker Siddley Trident 3B
-DeHavilland DH.16
-Boeing 737-200
                  - and some more if i decided what i will add

</details>



Credits : Nax (Model and Texture).
          Hashim (Fokker F7 Texture).
Thanks to Conczin for helping me with setting up project and trouble shooting.
and thanks to Immersive Aircraft and Man of Many Planes owner for providing useful                source code for add-on creation
